line: Implemented a focused F19 audit-log improvement: forgetting-lane mutation records now preserve before/after strength deltas and propagate them into the append-only write-ahead audit log.
- populated forgetting mutations with pre/post strength snapshots

items: populated forgetting mutations with pre/post strength snapshots

line: - Did not edit `crates/membrain-core/src/brain_store.rs` or `crates/membrain-core/src/types.rs` because multiple other agents currently hold conflicting reservations there.

items: Did not edit `crates/membrain-core/src/brain_store.rs` or `crates/membrain-core/src/types.rs` because multiple other agents currently hold conflicting reservations there.

line: - Chose the lowest-overlap, contract-aligned F19 gap: forgetting mutations previously emitted no before/after state even though the audit schema already supported it.

items: Chose the lowest-overlap, contract-aligned F19 gap: forgetting mutations previously emitted no before/after state even though the audit schema already supported it.

line: - Left recall-event emission untouched because current runtime code does not yet append `RecallServed` / `RecallDenied` at all; that is a larger follow-up than this safe patch.

items: Left recall-event emission untouched because current runtime code does not yet append `RecallServed` / `RecallDenied` at all; that is a larger follow-up than this safe patch.

line: - F19 infrastructure already existed: bounded append-only log, taxonomy, per-memory/range queries, and delta-capable rows were already in place.

items: F19 infrastructure already existed: bounded append-only log, taxonomy, per-memory/range queries, and delta-capable rows were already in place.

line: - The practical missing piece was mutation-lane coverage quality, not the core log container.

items: The practical missing piece was mutation-lane coverage quality, not the core log container.

line: - Forgetting had structured audit records but was dropping state deltas before conversion into `AuditLogEntry`.

items: Forgetting had structured audit records but was dropping state deltas before conversion into `AuditLogEntry`.
